title: Farmer's Cutting: Nether's Exoticism
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Nether's Exoticism
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Nether's Exoticism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nethers-exoticism)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- More dye from Pitaya Stems

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FClZlLMF/images/a53ff5d2ca187806c916905f65cb974b00491cbd.png) ![Pitaya Stem Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FClZlLMF/images/8ff9ea9987344cc0db6e5964ede3329492cfcb7c.png)
